negative_memory.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday cost pressure absorption rank over spread pressure ratio, spread relief intensity, cost absorption drive, close after cost pressure, volume cost confirmation, spread cluster pressure, price efficiency under cost, prior cost context, session phase maturity, cost resolution pressure, and spread stress features
negative_memory.next_boundary: C0092 R0001 shows the tested cost pressure absorption surface is not a candidate as implemented; remaining C0092 variants would be adjacent tuning, so next work should choose a new major C0093 hypothesis without selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims
negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence did not establish a candidate

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 1 profitable and 8 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -122.43, and worst fold rw_008 net PnL -19.54.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by 10.97 total net PnL across 6 better and 3 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0092 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or cost-pressure-absorption feature nudge tuning

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday cost pressure absorption rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: C0092 R0001 tests whether closed-M5 intraday spread/cost pressure followed by spread relief, directional price drive, close commitment, volume confirmation, and price efficiency under cost forms a portable entry surface after realistic FPMarkets US100 spread cost. It changes feature family, label conditioning, model context, and trade-logic state key from C0091 path asymmetry hazard. It is not a threshold/window/SL/TP/session/spread/capital nudge, materialization step, ONNX step, selected claim, runtime claim, or retry-only run.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: No C0091 thresholds, windows, stops, targets, sessions, spread gates, or capital sizing changes are used as the run question.
